title: Delay a duplicate Item from appearing
excerpt: I made a task board with automations to move the completed task into a “finished” board and create a duplicate item to repeat the task for the next time. Is there away to delay the duplicate item from showing up right aw…

posts.author: EHewitt (Emily Hewitt)
posts.cookedHtml: I made a task board with automations to move the completed task into a “finished” board and create a duplicate item to repeat the task for the next time. Is there away to delay the duplicate item from showing up right away?? Maybe like a day delay? Setting a time and date for the item to duplicate doesn’t really help because If we don’t get to said task before set date and time the items will just pile up. ( like 2 or 3 of the same item).

posts.author: tpitsikos (Joker2Face)
posts.cookedHtml:
